name: @forgemeshlabs/aso-score-mcp
description: Free Agent Signal Optimization scanner MCP server. Audits websites for agent discoverability, trust, interoperability, commerce, Google generative AI search, browser-agent UX, and machine-readable readiness signals.

tools.name: scan_site
tools.description: Scan a website and return an ASO Score Report with ASO score, maturity level, pillar scores, evidence, and recommendations.

tools.name: get_fix_plan
tools.description: Generate a prioritized remediation plan with ready-to-paste templates for missing agent-readiness signals.

tools.name: check_signal
tools.description: Run one specific agent-readiness check, such as llms-txt, a2a-agent-card, mcp-server-card, or x402.

tools.name: list_checks
tools.description: List every supported ASO scanner check with category, description, and spec link.

tools.name: get_aso_framework
tools.description: Return the Agent Signal Optimization framework reference, scoring pillars, maturity levels, and certification thresholds.
